reviews.review_description: I’ve had the app now for about 5 months and my son has really enjoyed it. The new training room concept is brilliant, set up a plan for a specific area that you want to work on and also reflect on the session. Really puts the player at the centre of the session. Living in wales there are many times during the year that outdoor coaching facilities can’t be used so a brilliant alternative for sharpening techniques. Looking forward to seeing the app develop in the future.

Runmakavr is an awesome tool for training in VR. It allows you to practice with high reps and with speeds and variations that you may not consistently encounter in net sessions but are necessary for levelling up your game. This is predominantly a training tool and one big plus is the high accuracy in bat tracking. I would love to see more features added over time like swing and spin as well as match simulation.

It’s a really immersive and realistic way of practicing and working on aspects of your batting. Lots of options and variations in the delivery pace, lines and lengths allow you to sharpen ans improve areas of your batting, without any fear. My daughter uses it and it has really helped develop her game through repetition and without fear, which she has then taken to the real nets and games.

I have been using Runmaka for a while now and it has genuinely surprised me with how useful it is as a training tool. At first I expected something quite game like but the more I used it the more I realised how close it gets to proper batting practice.

The biggest thing for me is how easy it makes training. I can pick it up whenever I want and run a proper session even when I would not normally be able to train. The Training Room is the feature I use the most because I can set up exactly what I want to work on whether that is short balls, full balls or something more specific. It feels like a real net session but without needing a bowler or even leaving the house.

One thing I have really noticed is how transferable it is. Movements and shot shapes I have been working on in the headset have shown up in real games. It is the first time I have used a piece of tech where I can physically feel the work paying off out in the middle.

It is also something that works for every level. I have seen kids use it and love it and also seen high level players get real value from it. It does not try to replace normal training it just gives you a way to train more often and on your own terms.

With new updates coming and a subscription model that will include coaching content and extra features it feels like it is only going to get better. For me it has been a genuinely useful addition to my training and something I now use as part of my regular practice

RunMakr VR is a brilliant tool for helping fast bowlers level up their batting. It lets them face realistic bowling in a virtual environment, so they can sharpen decision-making, shot selection, and game awareness without any extra physical load. For us at PaceLab, it’s a smart way to build confident, competent lower-order batters who can genuinely change games.

reviews.review_title: Why Runmaka belongs in your training…
reviews.review_description: Runmaka Cricket is brilliant!! I use it as a player and a coach and it delivers every time. The drills build strong habits and the feedback helps you improve quickly. You train with purpose and each session sharpens your decisions at the crease. It’s the first cricket VR app that truly lifts your game while keeping the work enjoyable. I also use it as a form of ‘active’ Visualisation and it adds real value to my training. Look forward to further updates.

I play IBcricket and after seeing this game in instagram i thought this is a like cool alternative (They mentioned in their comments regarding the training mode) to it but after playing for few minutes i found this game like a toy with no training capability and with worst graphics .

Waste of Money!

They also have a subscription mode which is ridiculously priced and it felt like a bait and switch buying this 

Rest assured I hope no one falls into this trap

This is an amazing tool for players and coaches. It’s evolving all the time and there seems to be no boundary to what it could be used for. 
It allows you to hit a high volume of balls in a short space of time without going to a net! Via the training room you can adjust speed, length, line and choose either a full width or narrow bat. 
The visuals are clear and as you can track the ball you get accurate shot feedback regarding how and where you’ve hit the ball. A lot more to come I feel!

reviews.review_title: Incredible tool for coaches and players
reviews.review_description:
What an amazing tool this is for cricketers. Fun, realistic & very beneficial for batters looking to enhance their everyday training.

Gives you hours of training regardless of weather, resources and many other uncontrollables.

Can’t put it down!
This is one of the best things you can do to improve your cricket and it’s helped me so much. It’s so good for alignment, timing and working on select shots and over all having fun with your mates.
Great training aid to work on certain area of batting. Used it in a school environment & has gone down well with the students! Would recommend!

reviews.review_title: Terrible, bat does not line up!
reviews.review_description: Unfortunately completely unplayable as the bat does not remotely even line up

developer_response.body: Sorry to hear this. It sounds a technical issue which will be easily resolved as the app does obviously work to pass all relevant criteria. If you email enquiries@runmakavr.com I'll be happy to help you correct the issue.

reviews.review_description:
Love this for practice, no need for nets, a bowling partner or dry weather.
We use everywhere whether just needing a cricket fix or to practice specific shots.
The training room is a brilliant addition allow to set set parametres
Highly Recommend

developer_response.body: Thanks! We appreciate your feedback as we look to develop even further into 2026.

reviews.review_description:
A realistic offering for training and warming up.  It is fully immersive and you get the chance to hit 100s of balls.

With exciting plans for the future, Runmaka is set to revolutionise the way we can prepare for games!

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review, much appreciated. Hope you enjoy hitting those 100s of balls and we will keep adding content as we go to continually draw out training experiences. Thanks again

reviews.review_description:
I heard about the app when it was mentioned on the Somerset live stream at the start of the season, and after straining my Achilles, I was looking for a way to train in a predictable & light way. Also, as a hobbyist batter, who knows they need to face a million balls, but doesn't often get the chance, this is the absolute perfect training aid.

Excellent & accurate physics, make this not just an effective training experience, but also brilliant fun, highly recommended. I've already started making little games, like hitting certain pillars etc, I look forward to extra features in future versions!

Took a while to find the right handle, but the AMVR extension grips is the one to seek out

developer_response.body: So pleased to hear this and thanks for the response, very much appreciated. We'll keep building and we're aiming at add a gap finding addition soon. Thanks again

reviews.review_description: Bat is glued to the floor. Can't do anything with the game

developer_response.body: The bat is controlled by the left hand controller.

reviews.review_description: I can’t use the bat when ever I load into a game I can’t move my bat it’s just stuck to my left side half way in the floor

developer_response.body: Many thanks for letting us know. Previous reports of this issue have been resolved by replacing the battery in the controller holding the bat. The Runmaka bat is used in the left hand controller. Hope this helps

reviews.review_description: I have bought the game for 12.99 but whenever I’m loading into game the bat is stuck on the floor this needs sorting

developer_response.body: Previous reports have found that replacing the battery in the controller holding the bat resolves this. Hope this helps. Many thanks

reviews.review_description: Downloaded this app and found myself totally addicted to it, the simulation is excellent especially with the new enhanced features - it really helps my timing and watching the ball onto the face of the bat allowing you to be very experimental.  This training app is fantastic to pick up for 5 minutes or 50 minutes,  have a net any time anywhere whatever the weather !  A great training aid highly recommended.

developer_response.body: Really appreciate the positive response, thank you. We have a lot of plans in the pipeline so keep an eye out. Thanks again.

reviews.review_description:
I have had the privilege to trial this before its release. We now have the app downloaded and my son, who is cricket obsessed loves it! 
He is 11 and loves to net, so during the winter months we find it hard to find indoor nets that are available. This app allows him to practice when he normally couldn’t. It’s so realistic, he moves his feet and is happy to try new shots that he wouldn’t do in the net. 
The main thing is that he’s facing 180 balls every 15 minutes. There is no way he could face this in real life, especially netting with kids in his own age group. 
He will develop new shots as well as mastering his own in a safe place. Moving his feet and repeating muscle memory for this is vital going forward. What a great addition to his training regime. Excellent stuff!

developer_response.body: Great feedback, thank you. Very much appreciated. I hope your lad is still enjoying it and scoring runs. Many thanks

reviews.review_description: This truly is an immersive experience that will really help you out with your batting training. It will help hand - eye coordination and will allow you to try out or develop new shots without getting hit by the ball or injured - so when you do it for real it will be like clockwork from muscle memory! The fact that you face a new ball will every 5 seconds means it’s intensive training and there’s no waiting around at all. Perfect for smart training.

developer_response.body: Great feedback, thank you. We'll keep adding new content and will let you know. The not getting injured area is something we are very keen on making the most of especially for learning how to play short pitched bowling. Thanks again

reviews.review_description: It is really good for online practise giving diffrent balls and improving my game

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback. Much appreciated. We'll keep adding more features too. Keep enjoying.
